Detailed Description

Typedef Documentation

SKL_MP4_SLICER
 

Hook function for pre/post processing of pictures.

This function is called after a macroblock row has been decoded, or just before encoding a row. The vertical row position is given by the parameter 'y', and is height is given by the parameter 'Height'.

In addition, this hook is called two times more at the start and end of picture scan. In this case, the 'Height' parameter is zero, and 'y' is either equal to 0 or to picture's Height.

See also:
SKL_MP4_ENC

SKL_MP4_DEC

Destructor of default analyzer.

Parameters:
Analyzer Must be an instance returned by Skl_MP4_Get_Default_Analyzer

SKL_EXPORT SKL_MP4_ANALYZER* Skl_MP4_Get_Default_Analyzer (  SKL_MEM_I *  Mem  ) 
 

factory for default Analyzer. Note that it is already assigned by default to each SKL_MP4_ENC instances. You need not set another one.
